items.title: Mourinho's Real Madrid return gets closer after Pérez wins presidential election
items.summary: Florentino Pérez has secured another four-year term as Real Madrid president, defeating Enrique Riquelme in the club elections. Pérez pledged more success, hinted at major signi...
items.whyItMatters: It adds variety to the sports mix without turning the page into a full sports wire.

items.title: Predicting how all 48 men's World Cup teams will d...
items.summary: Who will win the FIFA World Cup? Instead of predicting a final winner, we've picked every single result to show HOW our predicted winner will do it.
items.whyItMatters: Football creates regular global sports momentum and quick-return storylines.

items.title: Head out of Bangladesh tour, Marsh to miss ODIs; Murphy called up
items.summary: Head rested from the entire Bangladesh tour while Australia hope Marsh can recover from his ankle injury in time for the T20 series
items.whyItMatters: Cricket gives XLB a stronger India-relevant sports lane and a reason for repeat sports check-ins.
